scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run --cwd artifacts/analytics build && bun run --cwd artifacts/mockup-sandbox build && bun run --cwd artifacts/api-server build
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:libs && bun run --cwd artifacts/analytics typecheck && bun run --cwd artifacts/mockup-sandbox typecheck && bun run --cwd artifacts/api-server typecheck && bun run --cwd scripts typecheck
